cleavage agent: using Pronase E, a cocktail of proteases that induces sperm maturation
fragmentation method: detected, isolated, and fragmented by collision-induced dissociation
instrument: entered into an LTQ Orbitrap Velos Pro ion-trap mass spectrometer
labeling: C. elegans strains were maintained at 20 °C on NGM plates seeded with OP50 E. coli according to standard conditions unless otherwise stated.
